name: I'm at a highway access ramp
description: I'm at a highway access ramp
hints: A highway access ramp connecting the town to the freeway and a field.
NORTH returns to town. SOUTH goes to the freeway. EAST leads to a field of tall grass.
NORTH to Main & Hickory (room 3). SOUTH to the freeway (room 12, a loop). EAST to the field of tall grass (room 11) where you can DIG.
notes: Highway access ramp. NORTH returns to Main & Hickory (room 3). SOUTH goes to the freeway (room 12, which loops back to itself). EAST to field of tall grass (room 11).
